news.t: Zacks Earnings Consistent Portfolio (ZECP) ETF Celebrates 3-Year Anniversary

holdings.infoBox: ZECP is an equity ETF with a total of 61 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.90%, Apple at 7.35%, Microsoft at 5.97%, Caterpillar at 4.49%, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 3.17%.

overview.description: The Zacks Earnings Consistent Portfolio ETF (ZECP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in companies that exhibit high stability through recessionary periods. ZECP was launched on Aug 24, 2021 and is issued by Zacks.

data.title: Zacks Earnings Consistent Portfolio (ZECP) ETF Celebrates 3-Year Anniversary
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zacks Investment Management, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Zacks Investment Research with $15.1 billion in assets under management, celebrates the three-year anniversary of it...
